name: gemini-research-mcp
description: AI-powered research using Google Gemini: grounded search, URL extraction, Deep Research, and Deep Research Max

languageModelToolsInChat.name: gemini_research_web
languageModelToolsInChat.modelDescription: Fast web research with Gemini grounding (5-30 seconds). Use for fact-checking, current events, documentation.

languageModelToolsInChat.name: gemini_research_deep
languageModelToolsInChat.modelDescription: Default/fast Deep Research agent (3-20 minutes). Use for interactive research, competitive analysis, comparisons, investigations, and latency/cost-sensitive synthesis.

languageModelToolsInChat.name: gemini_research_deep_max
languageModelToolsInChat.modelDescription: Maximum-comprehensiveness Deep Research. Use when the user says Max, exhaustive, comprehensive, due diligence, market map, literature review, high-stakes, board-ready, offline/nightly, or prioritizes completeness over speed.

languageModelToolsInChat.name: gemini_fetch_webpage
languageModelToolsInChat.modelDescription: Extract clean Markdown from a specific public URL. Use for documentation, articles, and linked pages.

gemini-research-mcp.apiKey.markdownDescription: Your Gemini API key. Get one at [Google AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com/apikey).
